chat.mainGreeting: I See U! I'm Intelligent CU, your AI learning assistant
randomGreetings: Ready to start your learning journey?
How can I help you today?
Let's explore the ocean of knowledge together
What would you like to learn today?
I'm here to help you anytime
messageSuggestions: What's the weather like in Hong Kong this week?
Where is the NA Gym? What are the opening hours?
What are the recent breakthroughs in deep learning?
Compare CSCI3100 and CSCI3160 — which should I take?
How to plan the course selection path for CS major?
Write a quicksort algorithm in Python
My C++ assignment has compile errors, can you help?
What programming languages are mainly used in CUHK CSCI courses?

settings.name: Name
settings.emailReadOnly: Email address is managed by the system
settings.passwordManagedBySystem: Password is managed by the system administrator
settings.appDescription: iCU is an intelligent learning assistant designed to provide students with personalized learning experiences and smart Q&A services.

steps.operation: Register with CUHK unified identity or invitation code. New users need student ID, email, and invite code
steps.description: After login, the system auto-generates a JWT Token to maintain session

steps.operation: Click the "New Chat" button in the sidebar
steps.description: Ask any learning-related question. Regular chat does not support RAG; for RAG, go to Course Management and create a "Course Chat"

steps.operation: In the Course Chat window, click 📎 or drag & drop files (for RAG retrieval)
steps.description: Supports PDF, Word, images, plain text, etc.
View/create courses by semester, upload lecture notes and assignments
Supports light/dark theme, language switching, and notification preferences

smartChat.title: Smart Chat
items: Supports real-time streaming responses. RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) is only available in Course Chat, with citation sources shown below answers; regular chat does not support RAG.
Press ⌘/Ctrl + Enter in the input box to send quickly.
Use ↑/↓ to browse and re-edit previous questions.

courseManagement.title: Course Management
items: Courses are grouped by academic year/semester. Upload syllabi, lectures, assignments, etc.
Each course has its own dedicated "Course Chat" focused on course content.
Deleting a course also removes its files and chat history. Please proceed with caution.

fileCenter.title: File Center
items: Global file browser with filtering by upload time, course, or tags.
Images and PDFs have embedded preview; other formats can be downloaded.

billing.title: Balance & Billing
items: View current balance and spending history in Settings → Account.
Unit: Token. Approximately 0.002 USD per 1,000 tokens (example).
Supports campus payment or credit card top-up.

faq.question: Why did my PDF upload fail to parse?
faq.answer: Please check the file is under 40 MB and not encrypted. If it still fails, submit via "Report Issue" with the file attached.

faq.question: Can multiple people share the same course?
faq.answer: Yes. Add their CUHK email in Course → Member Management to share course files and chats.

faq.question: How do I export chat history?
faq.answer: In the chat window, click the … menu at the top-right and select Export Markdown/PDF.

faq.question: How do I reset my password?
faq.answer: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page. A reset email will be sent to your CUHK email.

report.title: Report Issue
bestPractices: Go to Settings → Report Issue → Click "Create Ticket".
After submitting, you will receive a ticket number (#INC-xxxx).
You can track progress and developer replies in "My Tickets".
formDetails: Title: Summarize the issue in one sentence, e.g., "PDF upload stuck at 99%".
Description: Detailed steps (reproduction path), expected result, actual result.
Environment: OS, browser version / mobile device model.
Attachments: Screenshots / screen recordings / problematic files.

categories.example: Chat won't load, file preview broken
Input box loses focus on Safari 14
Add LaTeX rendering, support batch export

slaData.description: Affects all users' core functions (login/chat down)
Affects some users or important features

updateData.description: Initial release — includes user manual, support, and issue reporting
